purpose: Apply authoritative online sources directly to FLCR-31..40 and the Standard Model Defining layer by claim lane.

sources.title: Particle Data Group Review of Particle Physics 2026
sources.closure: Current Standard Model particle/data review surface.

sources.title: NIST CODATA inverse fine-structure constant
sources.closure: alpha inverse numerical value 137.035999177 with standard uncertainty 0.000000021.

sources.title: NIST CODATA 2022 wallet card
sources.closure: Compact constants table for units-bearing calibration.

sources.title: CMS Higgs discovery paper
sources.closure: Independent Higgs discovery/mass-scale calibration near 125 GeV.

sources.title: Excitons in two-dimensional materials
sources.closure: Electron-hole-exciton formalism and material-dependent screening/binding boundary.

sources.title: NIST carrier dynamics by ultrafast THz spectroscopy
sources.closure: Experimental/metrology lane for excitons, electron-hole separation, recombination, and free carrier dynamics.

sources.title: NIST optoelectrical characterization of photovoltaic materials
sources.closure: Materials lane for exciton separation into free electrons and holes at heterojunction interfaces.

sources.title: Living Reviews in Relativity: Hyperbolic Methods for Einstein's Equations
sources.closure: GR/continuum formalism boundary for Einstein equations as PDE/hyperbolic systems after gauge/constraint handling.

sources.title: PPPL fusion/plasma magnetic confinement testimony
sources.closure: Plasma boundary row for charged-particle motion and magnetic confinement.

sources.title: PPPL Plasma Diagnostics lecture notes
sources.closure: Plasma definition/calibration row: plasma consists of particles and fields; diagnostics required for measured claims.
